announcements.title: sf-pi v0.27.0 — sf-lsp,sf-devbar: richer top-bar glyphs blending availability + activity
announcements.body: sf-lsp,sf-devbar: richer top-bar glyphs blending availability + activity — sf-lsp: flush-right HUD, show devbar pill, configurable icon

announcements.title: sf-pi is compatible with pi 0.71 (Gemini CLI / Antigravity removed)
announcements.body: pi 0.71 removed built-in Gemini CLI and Antigravity providers. sf-pi does not use them, so upgrading pi is safe. Set PI_CODING_AGENT_SESSION_DIR to relocate session storage (pi ≥ 0.71).
